ts/import-type-misuse._calibrationNote: v0.19: new rule (Inline `import { type X }` — prefer separate `import type`). Not yet calibrated. Scheduled for v9 calibration.

ts/optional-chain-overuse._calibrationNote: v0.19: new rule (Optional chain depth >= 5 — AI chains ?. rather than narrowing). Not yet calibrated. Scheduled for v9 calibration.
